content.speakerText: Hi, I'm Alex from TechNova. Nice to meet you!
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，我是TechNova的Alex，很高兴认识你！

options.text: Hi Alex, I'm Jamie from GlobalSoft. Likewise!
Oh, nice to meet you too, but I'm busy right now.
I don't know who you are.
Yeah, whatever. What do you want?

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Likewise!' 是英语中礼貌回应 'Nice to meet you' 的自然表达，表示 '我也是'。干扰项2虽然语法正确，但语气冷漠，不符合初次见面的友好语境；干扰项3和4完全不礼貌，违背社交礼仪。

content.speakerText: Hello, I'm Sophia from DesignWorks. Pleased to meet you!
content.speakerTextCn: 你好，我是DesignWorks的Sophia，很高兴认识你！

options.text: Same here. I'm Mark from InnovateLab.
I already know you from LinkedIn.
Are you new here? I don't remember seeing you before.
Nice to meet you too, but I have a meeting in five minutes.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Same here.' 是 'Likewise' 的口语化替代，自然且符合初次见面场景。干扰项2假设了不存在的熟悉关系，可能让对方尴尬；干扰项3带有质疑语气，不礼貌；干扰项4虽然礼貌，但提前结束对话显得不热情，不符合‘表达喜悦’的场景目标。

content.speakerText: Hi there! I'm Daniel. Great to finally meet you in person!
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨！我是Daniel，终于见到你本人了，真高兴！

options.text: Me too, Daniel! I'm Lisa from CreativeCo.
You look familiar. Have we met before?

content.explanation: 正确答案简洁、礼貌且包含自我介绍，完美回应了对方的热情。干扰项1是负面外貌评价，极不恰当；干扰项3质疑对方记忆，可能引发尴尬；干扰项4过于随意，不符合正式初次见面的语境。

content.template: Hi Alex, I'm Jamie from GlobalSoft. ___!
content.hint: 用于回应 'Nice to meet you' 的标准简短表达
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达（回应见面问候）

content.template: Pleased to meet you, ___. I'm Taylor from InnovateCorp.
content.hint: 在表达喜悦时，直接称呼对方名字更显礼貌和真诚
content.knowledgePoint: 称呼人名的用法（社交礼仪）

content.template: Hi! I'm Ben. ___ to meet you!
content.hint: 这是最常用、最自然的见面问候短语
content.knowledgePoint: 高频搭配（Nice to meet you）

content.speakerText: Hi, I'm Alex from TechNova. Nice to meet you!
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，我是TechNova的Alex，很高兴认识你！
expectedAnswers: Hi Alex, I'm Jamie from GlobalSoft. Likewise!
Pleased to meet you, Alex. I'm Jamie from GlobalSoft.
Hey Alex! I'm Jamie from GlobalSoft — really glad to meet you!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否礼貌回应并完成自我介绍
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：是否使用符合英语口语习惯的表达
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'Nice to meet you' 的回应和自我介绍

content.speakerText: Hello, I'm Maria from GlobalFinance. Great to meet you!
content.speakerTextCn: 你好，我是GlobalFinance的Maria，很高兴认识你！
expectedAnswers: Hi Maria! I'm Leo from TechStart. Likewise!
Nice to meet you too, Maria. I'm Leo from TechStart.
Hi Maria! I've heard a lot about you — I'm Leo from TechStart. Really happy to finally meet you!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应并提供自己的身份信息
语言准确性：用词和语法是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了符合职场初次见面的自然语气
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'Nice to meet you' 的回应、自我介绍和积极情绪词

content.speakerText: Hi there! I'm Raj from DesignHub. So nice to finally meet you in person!
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨！我是DesignHub的Raj，终于见到你本人了，真高兴！
expectedAnswers: Hi Raj! I'm Chloe from CreativeLab. Me too — I’ve been looking forward to this!
Pleased to meet you, Raj. I'm Chloe from CreativeLab.
Hey Raj! Chloe here — I'm so glad we finally connected in person!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否热情回应并表达见面喜悦
语言准确性：语法和用词是否恰当
表达自然度：是否使用了符合非正式但专业语境的口语表达
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'Nice to meet you' 的回应、自我介绍和情绪词（如 glad, excited）
